title: Infosys and Cursor Announce Strategic Collaboration for AI-Assisted Software Engineering
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with Cursor on January 27, 2026 to help global enterprises accelerate AI-assisted software engineering. The companies will establish a Center of Excellence to support enterprise adoption of software engineering agents for AI native products, using Cursor's enterprise-grade development capabilities across greenfield and brownfield opportunities. Infosys will integrate Cursor with Infosys Topaz Fabric to help clients build, modernize, and scale enterprise systems with increased velocity and higher quality. The CoE will also scale Cursor's AI software development capabilities across Infosys' global developer workforce and enable over 100,000 Infosys software engineers with agentic coding platforms. No deal value, duration, or financial guidance was disclosed.
